title: The fuction  buf_validate()  affects performance seriously and can be optimized
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_fuzz_data (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2) NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO test_fuzz_data (name, value) VALUES ('test1', 123.45), ('test2', NULL), ('test3', 678.90);
SELECT * FROM test_fuzz_data WHERE value IS NULL OR value > 100;
key_bug_features: buf_validate() validates LRU list multiple times unnecessarily
